chain_summary: Complete 4-WMI chain: WMI-1 (signal divergence) on psmgr_desc and session fields across psmgr_core.c and psmgr_sock.c; WMI-2 (live resource persist) shown in psmgr_process_data, psmgr_process_ctrl, psmgr_process_commit_req, psmgr_recvmsg, psmgr_connect, and psmgr_setsockopt; WMI-3 (attacker content) on psmgr_desc at psmgr_core.c:283 and psmgr_core.c:361; WMI-4 (control flow hijack) on psmgr_desc at psmgr_core.c:318 (process_ctrl), psmgr_recvmsg, psmgr_exec, and psmgr_sock.c:683 (setsockopt). The authoritative object psmgr_desc serves as the nucleus with WMI-3 and WMI-4 co-location.
